final:
// // This module implements a D flip-flop with an enable signal. When the clock signal (CLK) transitions to a negative edge and the enable signal (EN) is low, the output (Q) captures the value of the input (D). If the enable signal is high, the output retains its previous state.
module top_module(
    input D,
    input EN,
    input CLK,
    output reg Q
);always @(posedge CLK) begin
    if (EN) begin
        Q <= D;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a D flip-flop with an enable signal. When the clock signal (CLK) transitions to a negative edge and the enable signal (EN) is low, the output (Q) captures the value of the input (D). If the enable signal is high, the output retains its previous state.
